Return only JSON, no markdown or explanation.
The word shrub has rank 50 in a word similarity game, meaning it is close to the target.
Suggest 3 words that could be even closer to the hidden target than shrub.
Do not only return synonyms, group members, or subtypes of shrub.
Explore multiple relation types: synonyms, common adjectives/descriptors, collocations,
associated people or groups, causes/effects, and words that commonly appear near shrub.
If shrub is a noun, include plausible adjectives or descriptors associated with it.
Every word must be one common lowercase dictionary word.
Avoid these already tried words: ["bush", "fern", "hedge", "shrub", "tree"]
Do not suggest singular or plural forms of already tried words; Contexto treats them as the same guess.
JSON schema:
{"words": ["word1", "word2", "word3"]}
